creator: Forensic Science Intelligent Textbook

bloomLevel: Understand (L2) — explain the sequence of stages in the criminal justice process and where forensic evidence and constitutional protections apply.
chapter_title: Foundations of Forensic Science and Legal Principles

educational.topic: The Criminal Justice Process and Forensic Entry Points
learningObjectives: Explain the ordered sequence of the U.S. criminal justice process.
Identify where forensic evidence and constitutional protections apply at each stage.

pedagogical.interactionPattern: Clickable vertical flowchart with detail panel, forensic-entry-point highlight toggle, and constitutional badges
pedagogical.assessment: Students summarize each stage and match constitutional rules to tagged stages
